summary: The implementation addresses all 5 requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-5) with donation button in header, donation page with payment selection, backend donation processing, React Query hooks for donations, and donation history display in OrdersPage. All requested features appear to be implemented based on the diff evidence.

hallucinated_features.description: Optional donation message field in DonatePage
hallucinated_features.reason: The donation page includes a Textarea component for users to add an optional message with their donation. This feature was not requested in REQ-2, which only specified 'custom donation amount and select a payment method'.

hallucinated_features.description: Visual heart icon styling and theming for donation button
hallucinated_features.reason: The donation button uses a filled heart icon with destructive color styling (fill-destructive text-destructive). While REQ-1 requested consistent styling, the specific heart icon with red/destructive theming was not specified and goes beyond basic styling requirements.
The donation page implements specific validation rules for minimum ($1) and maximum ($100,000) donation amounts. REQ-2 only requested 'validation' without specifying these particular constraints.
The backend DonationRecord type includes a 'message' field to store the optional donation message. This was not part of REQ-3, which only specified storing 'timestamp, amount, and payment method'.
